data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks generally rose in pre-market trading in the US, with BMNR up 3.93%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, pre-market performance of crypto stocks in the US market was mixed. Strategy (MSTR) rose 2.23%, Robinhood (HOOD) rose 0.13%, Sharplink Gaming (SBET) rose 0.25%, BitMine (BMNR) rose 3.93%, and Circle (CRCL) fell 0.08%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

The championship is Bitget’s […]

data.title: Since the upgrade of the Bitget VIP system, users have saved a total of 289 million USDT in transaction fees.
data.description: Bitget recently released its VIP Evolution Report, systematically outlining the evolution of its VIP system. Previously, Bitget completed a comprehensive upgrade of its VIP service system. Following the upgrade, through structural fee optimization and benefit integration, it has created a lower-cost, more unified trading and asset management environment for high-frequency traders and high-net-worth individuals, further improving the capital efficiency of professional investors. The report shows that since July, Bitget VIP users have saved over $289 million in transaction fees. In the past year, VIP users earned $75.4 million through the platform's wealth management products and achieved $39.2 million in returns in LaunchPool and PoolX. In addition to trading and asset management performance, Bitget has also launched several exclusive services for VIP users, including 229 targeted events, over 10 international exchange programs, and 16 VIP-exclusive airdrop events, with a total airdrop size exceeding $3 million. Regarding multi-asset allocation, since the launch of US stock contracts, over 8,000 VIP users have participated by the end of 2025, with a cumulative trading volume exceeding $14.8 billion. The Bitget TradFi product, launched in early January this year, has attracted continued participation from VIP users, with related trading volume reaching $4 billion, reflecting the market's ongoing demand for a converged trading environment integrating crypto assets and traditional financial markets.

data.title: An address holding $358 million in long positions added to its short position in DASH, resulting in a total unrealized profit of $5.52 million.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0x94d...3814) holding $358 million in long positions in ETH, BTC, and SOL has added to its short position in DASH. This short position is the only one of its four current open positions, with a current unrealized profit of $5.52 million. The specific holdings and profit/loss details are as follows: ETH long positions: 67,425.59 ETH, unrealized profit of $2.34 million; BTC long positions: 968.1 ETH, unrealized profit of $1.022 million; SOL long positions: 527,000 ETH, unrealized profit of $1.289 million; DASH short positions: 107,000 ETH (approximately $7.25 million), unrealized profit of $870,000.

data.title: Santiment Says XRP Social Sentiment Hits ‘Extreme Fear’: Buy Signal?
data.description:
XRP is back in a familiar spot: social chatter has turned sharply bearish even as the market probes support after an early-January surge. Analytics firm Santiment said its social data shows XRP slipping into “Extreme Fear” after a roughly 19% pullback from its early-month high, a setup it argues has historically preceded rallies. Santiment wrote on Jan. 22 via X: “According to our social data, XRP has fallen into ‘Extreme Fear’ territory
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/xrp-news/santiment-xrp-social-sentiment-extreme-fear/

data.title: Currently, over 107,000 .SKR domains have been registered.
data.description: Currently, over 107,000 SKR domains have been registered; these domains are exclusively for Solana Mobile's Seeker phone holders. (SolanaFloor)

data.title: South Korean prosecutors lost a large sum of seized Bitcoin, with losses potentially reaching $48 million.
data.description: The Gwangju District Prosecutors' Office in South Korea recently discovered the loss of a large amount of Bitcoin related to a criminal case during a routine inspection of seized assets. The estimated loss is tens of billions of won (reports cite internal rumors of approximately 70 billion won, or about $48 million). It is understood that the prosecution stored Bitcoin-related passwords and other information on a mobile storage device, and the loss may have occurred during the inspection when the suspect mistakenly visited a allegedly fraudulent website. The Gwangju District Prosecutors' Office officially responded that they "could not confirm" the matter. An internal investigation has been launched. (Ohmynews)

data.title: An address spent $470,000 to buy 10.19 million RALPH tokens, and lost $355,000 within hours.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 11 hours ago, a newly created address (FYqRpV...DgLq) spent 470,000 USDC to buy 10.19 million RALPH. Shortly after the purchase, the price of RALPH fell, and the address sold all 10.19 million RALPH at a price of 114,861 USDC, incurring a loss of $355,000 within a few hours.

data.title: Gate.com launches a limited-time airdrop to TradeFi, allowing users to earn Alpha Points by trading.
data.description: Gate has announced a limited-time promotion offering Gate Alpha points for trading TradFi. During the promotion period, users who participate in real market trading through Gate TradFi and meet specified conditions can earn Gate Alpha points. Points are limited and available on a first-come, first-served basis. Promotion period: January 22, 16:00 – January 26, 16:00 (UTC+8). During the promotion period, users who successfully complete any single TradFi trade of at least 50 USDT in the Gate TradFi trading zone will receive 8 Gate Alpha points (limited to one claim per user).
